title: High Energy Cinematic Sports Celebration Poster
sourceTitle: High Energy Cinematic Sports Celebration Poster Featuring
prompt: A high-energy, cinematic sports celebration poster featuring multiple depictions of Cristiano Ronaldo wearing a vibrant yellow and blue football kit. At the top, a massive, detailed close-up profile of Ronaldo screaming in passionate victory dominates the frame, set against a backdrop of glowing stadium lights and a roaring crowd. Below him, an inverted glowing neon triangle frames several dynamic action poses: one standing confidently with arms crossed and a smile, another sprinting forward dribbling a football, one mid-air executing a volley kick, and another sliding on his knees in intense celebration. In the bottom right corner, he is shown kneeling with his eyes closed, reverently holding a gleaming golden trophy, while another identical large golden trophy sits prominently on a pedestal in the foreground. The entire composition has a dramatic, golden-hour glow, covered in sparkling golden dust and confetti, with the bold, metallic gold word "VICTORY" stretching across the very top.
originalPrompt: A high-energy, cinematic sports celebration poster featuring multiple depictions of Cristiano Ronaldo wearing a vibrant yellow and blue football kit. At the top, a massive, detailed close-up profile of Ronaldo screaming in passionate victory dominates the frame, set against a backdrop of glowing stadium lights and a roaring crowd. Below him, an inverted glowing neon triangle frames several dynamic action poses: one standing confidently with arms crossed and a smile, another sprinting forward dribbling a football, one mid-air executing a volley kick, and another sliding on his knees in intense celebration. In the bottom right corner, he is shown kneeling with his eyes closed, reverently holding a gleaming golden trophy, while another identical large golden trophy sits prominently on a pedestal in the foreground. The entire composition has a dramatic, golden-hour glow, covered in sparkling golden dust and confetti, with the bold, metallic gold word "VICTORY" stretching across the very top.

promptTranslations.zh: 一张高能、电影感的体育庆祝海报，画面中多次出现穿黄色与蓝色球衣的 Cristiano Ronaldo。顶部是一张巨大的侧脸特写，他在胜利中呐喊，背景是发光的体育场灯光和沸腾人群。下方用倒置霓虹三角形框住多个动态姿势：双臂交叉自信站立、带球冲刺、空中凌空抽射、滑跪庆祝。右下角他闭眼跪地，虔诚捧着金色奖杯，前景还有一座大型金色奖杯放在基座上。整体是金色时刻的戏剧光，铺满金色尘埃和彩纸，顶部用粗体金属金文字写着 "VICTORY"。
promptTranslations.fr: Affiche de célébration sportive très énergique et cinématographique, avec plusieurs apparitions de Cristiano Ronaldo en maillot jaune et bleu. En haut, un immense gros plan de profil le montre criant sa victoire, avec projecteurs de stade lumineux et foule en fusion derrière lui. En bas, un triangle néon inversé encadre plusieurs poses dynamiques : bras croisés avec assurance, sprint balle au pied, reprise acrobatique en plein vol et glissade de célébration. En bas à droite, il est agenouillé les yeux fermés, tenant avec ferveur un trophée doré ; au premier plan, une grande coupe dorée repose sur un socle. Lumière dramatique de golden hour, poussière dorée et confettis partout, avec le mot "VICTORY" en grandes lettres métalliques dorées en haut.
promptTranslations.ru: Энергичный кинематографичный постер спортивного празднования, где Cristiano Ronaldo несколько раз появляется в желто-синей форме. Вверху огромный профильный крупный план: он кричит от победы, позади светятся прожекторы стадиона и ревет толпа. Ниже перевернутый неоновый треугольник объединяет динамичные позы: уверенно скрещенные руки, рывок с мячом, удар в полете и скольжение на коленях. В правом нижнем углу он стоит на коленях с закрытыми глазами и благоговейно держит золотой кубок; на переднем плане крупный золотой трофей на постаменте. Драматичный свет golden hour, золотая пыль и конфетти, сверху крупная металлическая золотая надпись "VICTORY".
promptTranslations.pt: Pôster de celebração esportiva de alta energia e clima cinematográfico, com Cristiano Ronaldo aparecendo várias vezes usando uniforme amarelo e azul. No topo, um enorme close lateral mostra o grito de vitória, com luzes de estádio brilhantes e multidão em ebulição ao fundo. Abaixo, um triângulo de néon invertido enquadra poses dinâmicas: braços cruzados com confiança, corrida com a bola, voleio no ar e comemoração deslizando de joelhos. No canto inferior direito, ele ajoelha com os olhos fechados, segurando com devoção um troféu dourado; em primeiro plano, há uma grande taça dourada sobre um pedestal. Luz dramática de golden hour, poeira dourada e confetes por toda parte, com "VICTORY" no topo em letras metálicas douradas e grossas.
promptTranslations.ja: 黄色と青のユニフォームを着た Cristiano Ronaldo が複数回登場する、高揚感のあるシネマティックなスポーツ祝福ポスター。上部には勝利の叫びを上げる巨大な横顔クローズアップ、背景には輝くスタジアムライトと沸き立つ観客。下部では逆三角形のネオンフレームが、腕を組んだ自信ある立ち姿、ボールを持ったスプリント、空中ボレー、膝滑りの祝福を囲む。右下では目を閉じて跪き、金色のトロフィーを敬虔に抱える。前景にも台座に載った大きな金色のトロフィー。golden hour のドラマチックな光、金色の粉塵と紙吹雪、上部に太い金属ゴールド文字で "VICTORY"。
promptTranslations.ko: 노란색과 파란색 유니폼을 입은 Cristiano Ronaldo 가 여러 번 등장하는 고에너지 시네마틱 스포츠 세리머니 포스터. 상단에는 승리의 함성을 지르는 거대한 측면 클로즈업이 있고, 배경에는 빛나는 경기장 조명과 들끓는 관중이 보인다. 하단에는 뒤집힌 네온 삼각형 안에 자신감 있게 팔짱을 낀 자세, 공을 몰고 질주하는 장면, 공중 발리슛, 무릎 슬라이딩 세리머니가 배치된다. 오른쪽 아래에는 눈을 감고 무릎을 꿇은 채 금빛 트로피를 경건하게 들고 있으며, 전경에는 받침대 위의 큰 금색 트로피가 있다. golden hour 의 드라마틱한 빛, 금빛 먼지와 색종이, 상단에는 굵은 금속 골드 글자로 "VICTORY".
